channel.title: Redis on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Redis on Arrans github.io

item.title: makeplane/plane
item.description: 🔥🔥🔥 Open-source Jira, Linear, Monday, and ClickUp alternative. Plane is a modern project management platform to manage tasks, sprints, docs, and triage.

item.title: dbgate/dbgate
item.description: Database manager for MySQL, PostgreSQL, SQL Server, MongoDB, SQLite and others. Runs under Windows, Linux, Mac or as web application

item.title: gitroomhq/postiz-app
item.description: 📨 The ultimate social media scheduling tool, with a bunch of AI 🤖

item.title: coollabsio/coolify
item.description: An open-source, self-hostable PaaS alternative to Vercel, Heroku & Netlify that lets you easily deploy static sites, databases, full-stack applications and 280+ one-click services on your own servers.

item.title: vercel/chatbot
item.description: A full-featured, hackable Next.js AI chatbot built by Vercel

item.title: dicedb/dicedb
item.description: Open-source, low-latency key/value engine built on Valkey with query subscriptions and hierarchical storage tiers.

item.title: juicedata/juicefs
item.description: JuiceFS is a distributed POSIX file system built on top of Redis and S3.

item.title: redis/rueidis
item.description: A fast Golang Redis client that supports Client Side Caching, Auto Pipelining, RDMA, etc.

item.title: EchoVault/SugarDB
item.description: Embeddable and distributed in-memory alternative to Redis.
